title: nepeta glechoma
intro: Nepeta glechoma, also known as creeping catmint or ground ivy, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb native to Europe and parts of Asia. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nepeta glechoma include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Nepeta glechoma is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a culinary herb or added to skincare products for its soothing and anti-aging properties.
